test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/config/test_manager.py b/test/units/config/test_manager.py
index 56ce4f0..d64a7d2 100644
--- a/test/units/config/test_manager.py
+++ b/test/units/config/test_manager.py
@@ -64,12 +64,12 @@ ensure_test_data = [
 ]
 
 ensure_unquoting_test_data = [
-    ('"value"', '"value"', 'str', 'env'),
-    ('"value"', '"value"', 'str', 'yaml'),
-    ('"value"', 'value', 'str', 'ini'),
-    ('\'value\'', 'value', 'str', 'ini'),
-    ('\'\'value\'\'', '\'value\'', 'str', 'ini'),
-    ('""value""', '"value"', 'str', 'ini')
+    ('"value"', '"value"', 'str', 'default', None),
+    ('"value"', '"value"', 'str', os.path.join(curdir, 'test.yml'), 'yaml'),
+    ('"value"', 'value', 'str', cfg_file, 'ini'),
+    ("''value''", "'value'", 'str', cfg_file, 'ini'),
+    ('""value""', '"value"', 'str', cfg_file, 'ini'),
+    ('"value"', '"value"', 'str', 'ini', None)
 ]
 
 
@@ -86,9 +86,16 @@ class TestConfigManager:
     def test_ensure_type(self, value, expected_type, python_type):
         assert isinstance(ensure_type(value, expected_type), python_type)
 
-    @pytest.mark.parametrize("value, expected_value, value_type, origin", ensure_unquoting_test_data)
-    def test_ensure_type_unquoting(self, value, expected_value, value_type, origin):
-        actual_value = ensure_type(value, value_type, origin)
+    @pytest.mark.parametrize("value, expected_value, value_type, origin, ft", ensure_unquoting_test_data)
+    def test_ensure_type_unquoting(self, value, expected_value, value_type, origin, ft):
+        actual_value = ensure_type(value, value_type, origin, ft)
         assert actual_value == expected_value
 
+    def test_value_and_origin_from_ini_string_is_unquoted(self, tmp_path):
+        cfg_path = tmp_path / 'quoted.cfg'
+        cfg_path.write_text('[defaults]\ninikey = "fromini"\n', encoding='utf-8')
+
+        manager = ConfigManager(str(cfg_path), os.path.join(curdir, 'test.yml'))
+        assert manager.get_config_value_and_origin('config_entry') == ('fromini', str(cfg_path))
+
     def test_resolve_path(self):
